positive: A minimalist, abstract depiction of a deep space nebula swirling with iridescent cosmic dust and bioluminescent stellar clusters. The composition features sweeping, elegant curves and organic, fluid shapes in shades of sapphire blue, deep indigo, ethereal lavender, and shimmering gold accents. The style should be highly graphic, resembling a stylized silk painting or modern scientific illustration. Ensure strong contrast between the glowing nebula core and the deep black void. Perfect for a circular or central repeat pattern, clean silhouette, high detail, vector-like smoothness, designed for t-shirt printing.
